name: Badlands Brawl
effect: The Greenskin-and-Ogre regional league — governs which star players and inducements the team may hire.

name: Chaos Clash
effect: The league of the Chaos powers — governs star-player and inducement access. A Chaos Renegades team picks one Favoured of (Chaos god) alignment at draft.

name: Elven Kingdoms League
effect: The elven league — governs which star players and inducements the team may hire.

name: Halfling Thimble Cup
effect: A league for the smaller folk — governs which star players and inducements the team may hire.

name: Lustrian Superleague
effect: The ancient Lustrian league — governs which star players and inducements the team may hire.

name: Old World Classic
effect: The Old World league of diverse human-and-allied teams — governs which star players and inducements the team may hire.

name: Sylvanian Spotlight
effect: The undead league — governs which star players and inducements the team may hire.

name: Underworld Challenge
effect: The league of underground-dwelling fringe races — governs which star players and inducements the team may hire.

name: Woodland League
effect: A forest league — governs which star players and inducements the team may hire.

name: Worlds Edge Superleague
effect: The mountain league, traditionally Dwarven — governs which star players and inducements the team may hire.

name: Brawlin' Brutes
effect: Players earn 3 SPP for causing a [[casualty]] (not 2), but only 2 SPP for a Touchdown (not 3).

name: Bribery and Corruption
effect: Once per game, re-roll a 1 when Arguing the Call. Bribes cost 50,000 gp (limit 0-6) and a Biased Referee costs 80,000 gp.

name: Favoured of Hashut
effect: The team's Chaos alignment (Hashut) — governs which Chaos star players it may hire.

name: Favoured of Khorne
effect: The team's Chaos alignment (Khorne) — governs which Chaos star players it may hire.

name: Favoured of Nurgle
effect: The team's Chaos alignment (Nurgle) — governs Chaos star access and lets the team take the Plague Doctor inducement.

name: Low Cost Linemen
effect: In league play, Lineman hiring fees count as 0 gp toward Team Value; the team may take the Riotous Rookies inducement.

name: Masters of Undeath
effect: Once per game, Raise the Dead — a slain opposition player of ST 4 or less rises as a free Zombie or Skeleton Lineman in your reserves (kept after the game). May take the Mortuary Assistant inducement.

name: Swarming
effect: At the start of each drive, set up D3 extra Lineman from reserves, beyond the usual eleven.

name: Team Captain
effect: Nominate a non-Big-Guy starter as captain: it gains [[pro]] for free, and whenever you use a team re-roll a natural 6 makes that re-roll free.
